name: SQL Injection in user login
description: User-supplied input is concatenated directly into SQL query without sanitization.

name: Remote Code Execution via deserialization
description: Untrusted data is deserialized without validation allowing arbitrary code execution.

name: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) in search results
description: User input rendered directly to DOM without escaping.

name: Exposed AWS credentials in environment
description: AWS access keys committed to repository.

name: Missing CSRF protection on API endpoint
description: API endpoint modifies state but lacks CSRF token validation.
